test.command: cd /home/ubuntu/git-repos/slop-code-bench && uv run pytest tests/runner/ tests/analysis/ -q --no-header 2>/dev/null || uv run pytest tests/runner/ -q --no-header

typecheck.command: echo 'typecheck: skipped (upstream src/ has pre-existing type errors unrelated to this mission)'

lint.command: cd /home/ubuntu/git-repos/slop-code-bench && if [ -d tests/analysis ]; then uv run ruff check research/ tests/runner/ tests/analysis/ .factory/; else uv run ruff check research/ tests/runner/ .factory/; fi

blockingIssues.description: Review Board role doc says all Dolt queries must include validation filters but includes unfiltered `FROM experiments;` queries, violating the literal no-exceptions filter contract.
Red Team role doc assigns pre-dispatch blocking-review bead/link creation to Mayor instead of Red Team workflow, leaving VAL-ROLES-005 responsibility unmet/ambiguous.

appliedUpdates.description: Added role asset persistence guidance clarifying that live `~/gt/scbench/polecats/<role>/.claude/` files should be mirrored in `research/roles/<role>/` for source control.
Documented two operational facts: role hook PATH must include `/home/ubuntu/gopath/bin` and `/home/ubuntu/go/bin`, and bead automation should use `bd --json` instead of relying on `-q` output shape.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update `.factory/skills/integration-worker/SKILL.md` role-setup steps to explicitly require dual-write persistence for analytical roles: deploy live files to `~/gt/scbench/polecats/<role>/.claude/` and commit mirrored canonical copies under `research/roles/<role>/`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Same gap reported by review-board-role, idea-factory-role, and research-loop-wiring scrutiny reports.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update `.factory/skills/integration-worker/SKILL.md` to require that Red Team pre-dispatch instructions explicitly create and link the blocking review bead (`bd link --type blocks`) rather than delegating ownership to Mayor.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Blocking issue in red-team-role scrutiny report shows VAL-ROLES-005 ownership ambiguity.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a mission-level convention for workspace-only artifacts (especially `~/gt/scbench/polecats/`): treat in-repo `research/roles/<role>/` as canonical and keep it synchronized with deployed workspace copies.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: review-board-role transcript/review shows repeated worker ambiguity under mandatory commit/push rules when outputs are in gitignored workspace paths.

rejectedObservations.observation: Dual-write persistence note from research-loop-wiring report
Dual-write persistence note from idea-factory-role report
